---
title: "Scores"
format: html
---

This report creates an interactive scorigami plot using Plotly so you can hover over score pairs.

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

games <- read_csv("Games.csv")

score_pairs <- games %>%
  count(homeScore, awayScore, name = "count")

plot_ly(
  data = score_pairs,
  x = ~homeScore,
  y = ~awayScore,
  z = ~count,
  type = "heatmap",
  colors = viridisLite::magma(256),
  hovertemplate = "Home: %{x}<br>Away: %{y}<br>Games: %{z}<extra></extra>"
) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Interactive Scorigami Plot",
    xaxis = list(title = "Home Score"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Away Score")
  ) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```
